What's New on MedlinePlus

What's New on MedlinePlus 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
October 16, 2024
Two New Medical Tests Added to MedlinePlus
Two new medical tests are now available on MedlinePlus:
Calprotectin Stool Test 
This test measures a protein, calprotectin, in your stool (poop). High levels are a sign of inflammation in your intestines that may cause severe diarrhea.
Pneumococcal Disease Tests 
These tests check for the bacteria that cause pneumococcal disease. The tests may be do
